title: Everyone's holding their laptops open
summary: Matthew Berman posts commentary titled "Everyone's holding their laptops open," likely referring to sustained engagement with AI tools or systems. The post includes a sponsorship mention of DigitalOcean's AI-Native Cloud platform.
